summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. Deterministic validation marked the hydrated PR targets as security-sensitive, so each affected item is quarantined with a non-mutating route_security action. Five job refs were not present as hydrated preflight items in the compacted artifact, so they remain blocked for human/live-state rehydration before any decision. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise_pr mutation is planned.
